description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist exterior. The facade is clad in a light beige or tan brick or stone texture, with large rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors. The front features a single main door and several windows, while the rear has a set of double glass doors and additional windows. The interior layout is visible from above, showing partitioned rooms and white interior walls. The house lacks decorative elements such as balconies, porches, or overhangs, emphasizing a clean and functional design.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, beige brick exterior, and symmetrical window rows. The design is minimalist with large windows and a simple entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door and six large windows arranged symmetrically across two floors.
description_view_1: Side view with a single window on each floor and a clear view of the interior room partitions.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring double glass doors on the ground floor and five windows, with a similar symmetrical arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with one window per floor and visible interior partitions.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with no porch or overhang, flush with the facade and flanked by windows.
